provenance.normative_candidate: 2.0 First Draft - Complete Pre-Testnet Design Blueprint

rows.current_behavior: All 236 current transaction contracts are bound to explicit maintainer-reviewed semantic snapshots.
rows.target_behavior: All transaction contracts receive reviewed exact semantics.
rows.title: Transaction contract semantics

rows.current_behavior: All 159 current route contracts are bound to explicit maintainer-reviewed semantic snapshots.
rows.target_behavior: Every public route has explicit reviewed metadata.
rows.title: Route contract semantics

rows.current_behavior: W1 machine-verification closure is complete; independent external review remains a launch-authorization gate and is not represented as completed.
rows.target_behavior: Independent reviewer signs same-commit W1 evidence before launch authorization.
rows.title: Independent review evidence

truth_boundary: The exact uploaded v2.0 First Draft PDF is retained and hash-bound. Its extracted full-scope registers control W1 human-machine equality. Structural compiler coverage does not prove runtime correctness, independent review, interoperability, capacity, or production activation.
